We process personal data under UAE Federal Decree-Law 45/2021 (PDPL) and relevant DIFC/ADGM data protection rules; purposes include onboarding, verification of trade licence, access control, benefits administration, and issuer-compliance archiving.
For Mr. Sami Al Qasimi (employee no. NR-00Z-1), we process E m i r a t e s   I D 784-19**-*******-* and a biometric iris template for D I F C office entry gates; access logs are retained for 30 days unless a security incident extends retention.
We also hold his health treatment invoice for a cardiac check‑up dated 2026‑03‑18 and visa‑medical vaccination status, strictly for insurance reimbursement and legal obligations; these records are kept 5 years
